name: Banca Finnat Euramerica S.p.A.
summary: Banca Finnat Euramerica S.p.A., together with its subsidiaries, provides various financial services in Italy. It operates through Private Banking, Investment Banking, Advisory and Corporate Finance, Trusteeship Activity, Asset Management-Real Estate Fund Management, and Financial Holding and Governance Centre. The company offers a range of services, including private banking, family office, trusteeship, institutional investors, advisory and corporate finance, real estate and real estate funds, consulting, and other banking services. It has operative branches in Rome, Milan, and Novi Ligure. Banca Finnat Euramerica S.p.A. was founded in 1898 and is headquartered in Rome, Italy.
